meaning: vt.收到,接到,接收,遭到,受到,接待,接见
examples: He will receive $6,000 in back pay.
I didn't receive a letter from him yet.
All joiners will receive a welcome pack.
School Principals in many developing countries receive little, if any, leadership and development training.
Most Indonesians convicted of murder receive much harsher sentences and see their appeals fail.
